characters.name: Abigail Stanton
characters.description: Abigail StantonBiographyFull NameAbigail StantonGenderFemaleRelativesNoah Stanton(husband) †Peter Stanton(son) †Clara Flynn(daughter-in-law viaPeter)Cody Stanton(adopted son)Rebecca Stanton(adopted daughter)RomancesHenry GowenFrank HoganBill AveryProductionSeasonsWCTH:1-6,14WHC: Christmas SpecialFirst“Lost and Found”Last“When Hope Calls Christmas”Portrayed byLori LoughlinAbigail Stantonis a main character inSeasons 1-6and is set to appear inSeason 14of the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byLori Loughlin. WHC: Christmas Special Abigail Stanton is one of the first widows seen in thepilot episodeofWhen Calls the Heart. She moved toCoal Valley(now Hope Valley) several years before with her husbandNoahand sonPeter. Both of them died in the explosion of the mine. Since then, Abigail was a source of strength and hope for all the other widows in Coal Valley.

characters.name: Adeline Foster
characters.description: AJ FosterBiographyFull NameAdeline Josephine FosterNicknamesAJ (nickname)Mary Dickerson (alias)GenderFemaleRomancesBill AveryProductionSeasons4-5Episodes4First“Healing Heart”Last“Weather the Storm”Portrayed byJosie BissettAdeline Josephine “AJ” Fosteris a recurring character in theHallmarkdramaWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byJosie Bissett. Billfound her living inMedford Falls, hiding out in a cabin. She had worked at the bank as an auditor where Henry was depositing town funds into personal accounts. She agreed to testify against him.Ray Wyatt’smen threatened to kill her mother if she didn’t make the evidence go away. AJ decided to change her story and made phony ledgers. Ray Wyatt gave her hush money and set her up in the cabin. She was afraid to go to the authorities because of the railroad’s influence in the territory. Bill offered to try to get her a plea deal if she’d cooperate. She agreed to show Bill where she had buried the original ledgers but tried to escape on her horse. Bill shot into the air, spooking the horse so it threw her off. She wasn’t injured, but Bill informed her that if she did that again, she was going to jail. In the woods, Wyatt’s men began shooting at Bill and AJ. He shot back and they escaped on his horse.[1] In the woods, AJ and Bill encountered a bounty hunter, who wanted to take AJ back to town so he could collect the reward. He pulled a gun on Bill, so AJ pretended to cooperate and then punched him, knocking him out. She promised to stop trying to run away. Once they found the ledgers, AJ pulled a gun on Bill, but couldn’t bring herself to shoot him. Also, he’d emptied the chamber beforehand. They spotted another man in the woods looking for AJ, so they decided to have Bill pretend to be dead. AJ told the man she’d accidentally killed Bill, and once the man’s back was turned, Bill tackled him and knocked him out. Once they got back toHope Valley, Bill had to put AJ in jail. Just before he closed the door, she kissed him. When Bill returned to the jail with her dinner, he found the door open and AJ gone.[2]

characters.name: Agatha Thatcher
characters.description: Agatha ThatcherBiographyFull NameAgatha ThatcherStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesWilliam ThatcherGrace ThatcherElizabeth Thornton(niece)Viola Thatcher(niece)Julie Thatcher(niece)Jack Thornton Jr.(grand-nephew)ResidenceHamiltonProductionSeasons2,10Episodes3First“Trials of the Heart”Last“Hope Springs”Portrayed byKarin KonovalAgatha ThatcherisElizabeth Thornton’saunt. She appeared in inWhen Calls the HeartSeasons2and10. Grace ThatcherElizabeth Thornton(niece)Viola Thatcher(niece)Julie Thatcher(niece)Jack Thornton Jr.(grand-nephew) Agatha traveled to Hope Valley along with her niece Julie Thatcher to meet Lucas and discuss wedding plans. She enjoyed visiting the hot springs. Agatha also played a game of poker with Lucas, which he allowed her to win. She recognized that Lucas was destined for greater things than just being a small-town saloon owner. Agatha encouraged Elizabeth to make the most of her second chance at love.[1]

characters.name: Allie Grant
characters.description: Allie GrantBiographyFull NameAllison Mayes GrantNicknamesAlliePigtails (byWyatt)BirthAutumn 1904 (age 17)StatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesNathan Grant(Uncle and Adoptive Father)Colleen Grant† (Mother)Dylan Parks(Biological Father)Archie Grant(Grandfather)Unnamed grandmotherRomancesOliver GarrettOccupationStudent, BabysitterResidenceHope ValleyProductionSeasons6-13First“Surprise”Portrayed byJaeda Lily MillerAllison “Allie” Grant(formerlyParks) is a recurring character who was introduced inSeason 6ofWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byJaeda Lily Miller. Allie was born in autumn 1904 to Colleen and Dylan Parks. Her mother died when Allie was only four years old and her father left her shortly thereafter. Her uncle, Nathan Grant, took guardianship of her. Allie and Nathan's constant moving around due to his work made it hard for her to make friends. Allie was told she resembled her mother in looks[1]and personality. Nathan described her as being "bull-headed and independent.” Allie was a smart girl but had a stubborn streak and sometimes did not listen to her uncle. One of her favorite activities was fishing. Due to the loss of her mother, she looked to Elizabeth Thornton as a maternal figure. She had trouble making friends at first, but soon developed a number of friendships. Allie excelled in math, science, and reading. Allie came to Hope Valley at 10 years old with her uncle and guardian,Constable Nathan Grant. She even skipped school on her first day in Hope Valley, and ended up in theQueen of Heartssaloon whereLucas Bouchardtaught her a card trick to break the ice with her new classmates. Afterwards, rather than go to school, she went fishing.

characters.name: Andrew Hargraves
characters.description: Andrew HargravesBiographyFull NameAndrew HargravesStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationMountie SuperintendentProductionSeasons8,11-12Episodes4First"From the Ashes"Last"The Mountie Way"Portrayed byDavid James LewisAndrew Hargravesis a minor character inWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byDavid Lewis. Hargraves wasNathan Grant's superior officer atFort Clay. Hargraves also knew Bill from his time in the Mounties. There seemed to be bad blood between him and Nathan. He disciplined Nathan for disobeying orders, which meant Nathan was suspended from the training mission in which Jack took his place, and ultimately lost his life. Hargraves closed the investigation into Lucas’s shooting before Nathan thought it should be. He arrived in Hope Valley unexpectedly, asking to speak to Elizabeth and interrupting a romantic moment between her and Nathan.

characters.name: Angela Canfield
characters.description: Angela CanfieldBiographyFull NameAngela CanfieldBirthApprox. 1904StatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesJoseph Canfield(father)Minnie Canfield(mother)Cooper Canfield(brother)OccupationStudent at the Schwartzman SchoolResidenceHamiltonProductionSeasons8-12Episodes45First"Welcome to Hope Valley"Last"Must Be Gold"Portrayed byVienna LeacockAngela Canfieldis a recurring character in the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byVienna Leacock. Angela is the oldest child of Joseph and Minnie Canfield, and the sister of Cooper Canfield. As a young child, she became ill, and her parents brought her to a doctor who wouldn't treat her due to prejudice. This led to her becoming blind. Despite her disability, Angela works hard and excels in her studies. Before arriving inHope Valley, she was homeschooled by her mother. Angela loves music and is a talented pianist. Angela arrived in Hope Valley in 1918, when she was 14 years old. She is helped down the stairs of their new home of their brother as she is blind. Her mother has been home schooling her. Elizabeth gives her one of her favorite books,Anne of Green Gables. Angela is excited. As Elizabeth tries to invite Angela to school, her mom, Minnie, cuts off Elizabeth.[1]

characters.name: Anna Hayford
characters.description: Anna HayfordBiographyFull NameAnna HayfordStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesBertha Hayford(mother)OccupationStudent TeacherResidenceCapital CityProductionSeasons1,3-9,11Episodes48First“Lost and Found”Last“Believe”Portrayed byKadence Kendall Roach Anna Hayfordis a recurring character who first appeared inSeason 1of the Hallmark dramaWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byKadence Kendall Roach. Anna confided in Elizabeth that her mom was moving away. She wanted to stay and work in the cafe, living on her own. Elizabeth promised to help her do that. Anna said she was not afraid because she was inspired by Elizabeth. Minnie offered to let Anna stay in the rooms above the café. She accepted, continuing her job at the café.[1]

characters.name: Augustus Landis
characters.description: Augustus LandisBiographyFull NameAugustus LandisStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationSchool Inspector, Music TeacherProductionSeasons8-9Episodes5First"What the Heart Wants"Last"Journey into the Light"Portrayed byTodd ThomsonAugustus Landiswas introduced inSeason 8ofWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byTodd Thomson. Augustus Landis was a music teacher who gave private lessons before becoming a school inspector working for the district school system. He seems like a no business man but eventually mellows to show his true kind side who works well with students. Augustus Landis arrived in Hope Valley in 1918. He is a school inspector sent to try to consolidate the Hope Valley School into a district school. He said that with the foundry families coming into town making the school grow, the school board plans to make her school into a district school. Elizabeth declines stating it is her school alone.

characters.name: Augustus Landis
characters.description: Augustus LandisBiographyFull NameAugustus LandisStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationSchool Inspector, Music TeacherProductionSeasons8-9Episodes5First"What the Heart Wants"Last"Journey into the Light"Portrayed byTodd ThomsonAugustus Landiswas introduced inSeason 8ofWhen Calls the Heart. characters.name: Ava Riella
characters.description: Ava RiellaBiographyFull NameAva RiellaStatusAliveGenderFemaleProductionSeasons12Episodes5First"Mom's the Word"Last"Buried Treasure"Portrayed byTiera Skovbye Ava Riellais a recurring character in the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byTiera Skovbye. Ava Riella used to work for a con man namedClive Maxwell. He would use her as a plant to get information out of people in the audience so that he could get money out of them. Clive came up with a scam in which Ava would pretend to faint in the audience, and then he would pick pocket the audience member onstage. Ava reluctantly went along with the plan after Clive threatened her. When they tried the fainting scam, the person he pickpocketed ended up being a Pinkerton. When Ava and Clive were confronted by the Pinkertons, Clive blamed her for what happened, and she ran away. Having read about Hope Valley in Elizabeth's book,A Single Mother on the Frontier, Ava decided to seek refuge there, making up a story about being an heiress.

characters.name: Ben Mendelson
characters.description: Ben MendelsonBiographyFull NameBen MendelsonStatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesElsa Mendelson(wife)Timmy Mendelson(son)ResidenceBrookfieldProductionPortrayed byJonathan Potts Ben Mendelsonis a recurring character in the drama seriesWhen Hope Calls. He is portrayed byJonathan Potts.

characters.name: Bernhardt Montague
characters.description: Bernhardt MontagueBiographyFull NameBernhardt MontagueStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationUnion City HoldingsResidenceUnion CityProductionSeasons10-11First"Best Laid Plans"Portrayed byBenjamin WilkinsonBernhardt Montagueis a recurring character who first appeared inSeason 10ofWhen Calls the Heart.He is portrayed byBenjamin Wilkinson. Montague first arrived inHope Valleyunder the guise of beingMadeline St. John’sfiancé. He assigned a crew of men to work onBill’sland, which she had purchased. Neighbors heard noises and reported the goings-on toNathan.Elizabethwas suspicious and engaged him in conversation aboutMadelineand her sonJamiebut Montague seemed not to know anything about him. When Nathan investigated, the workers said they were digging a well. It was eventually revealed that Montague was not, in fact, Madeline’s fiancé, but rather the head of a company called Union City Holdings, which was working alongsideGovernor Balfourto redirect water away from Hope Valley and other small towns and send it toUnion City. WhenLucaspublicly exposed this plot, Montague was angry and told him he had no idea who he’d crossed.

characters.name: Bertha Hayford
characters.description: Bertha HayfordBiographyFull NameBertha HayfordStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesAnna Hayford(daughter)ProductionSeasons5-6First“Hearts and Minds”Last“Two of Hearts”Portrayed bySheri Rabold Bertha Hayfordis a minor character who appeared in Seasons 5-6 of the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed bySheri Rabold.

characters.name: Bill Avery
characters.description: Bill AveryBiographyGenderMaleRelativesNora Avery(ex-wife)Martin Avery(adopted son)†Jack Thornton Jr.(godson)RomancesGeorgie McGillAJ FosterDottie RamseyAbigail StantonNora AveryOccupationPart owner ofAbigail's CafeJudge ofHope ValleyResidenceHope ValleyProductionSeasons1-13First"Rules of Engagement"Portrayed byJack WagnerBill Averyis a main character in the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byJack Wagner. Bill originally came toCoal Valleyto investigate the mine disaster. He co-owned Abigail's Cafe with Abigail and served the town as sheriff, and later, judge. Bill was a former Mountie Inspector/forensic investigator who arrives inHope Valleyfor a mine explosion investigation. Bill went undercover investigating counterfeit money. He suspected there was an inside man and continued working the case against his supervisor’s orders. Eventually, Jack caught him red handed with counterfeit plates and arrested him. Bill and Abigail were in a relationship until Bill’s wife Nora showed up in Hope Valley and Abigail learned he was still legally married.

characters.name: Billy Hamilton
characters.description: Billy HamiltonBiographyGenderMaleRomancesElizabeth Thatcher(fling)OccupationCoal MinerCon-artistResidenceCoal ValleyProductionSeasons1Portrayed byAndrew W. WalkerBilly Hamiltonis a recurring character in theHallmarkdramaWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byAndrew W. Walker. Charming, and knows how to let a woman know what she wants to hear. First appears on episode 5 "The Dance" as a coal mine worker. He is taken by Elizabeth and charms her. Billy finds out that Elizabeth loves poetry, steals a poem calling it his and that is just for her. Constable Jack warns Elizabeth that Billy is probably hiding something from her but she doesn't see how a kind and charming man could be deceptive. One night, Billy mentions Elizabeth's two sisters and being rich but Elizabeth catches this knowing she never told Billy about them. Elizabeth tells Jack about Billy's knowledge of her family and realizes he came to Coal Valley soon after the mining incident (around the time Elizabeth left to come to Coal Valley as a teacher). Jack found an article saying "rich heiress heads west to be a school teacher" and knows that's why Billy came to Coal Valley. Later, Elizabeth reveals that she contacted her sister Julie about Billy and that he was fired from his last employer for stealing from the company.

characters.name: Bixby Balfour
characters.description: Bixby BalfourBiographyFull NameBixby BalfourNicknamesBixGenderMaleOccupationTerritorial Governor (formerly)ProductionFirst"Deep Water"Last"Long Time Running"Portrayed byMark BrandonBixby Balfourappeared inSeason 10ofWhen Calls the Heart. He is played byMark Brandon. In 1920, Balfour was serving as territorial governor. Balfour visited Hope Valley as part of his re-election campaign. The town put on special events for his arrival, including a black-tie ball at the Queen of Hearts. During the ball, the citizens of Hope Valley tried to appeal to Balfour to have him stop the water diversion scheme. Unfortunately, he was in cahoots with Montague and refused to put a stop to it. After Lucas made a publicly broadcast speech outing Balfour as being part of the water diversion scheme, Balfour left town in disgust along with Montague. Shortly afterward, Balfour’s opponent dropped out of the race, and Lucas decided to run in his stead. Lucas was elected Governor and Balfour was out.

characters.name: Bixby Balfour
characters.description: Bixby BalfourBiographyFull NameBixby BalfourNicknamesBixGenderMaleOccupationTerritorial Governor (formerly)ProductionFirst"Deep Water"Last"Long Time Running"Portrayed byMark BrandonBixby Balfourappeared inSeason 10ofWhen Calls the Heart. He is played byMark Brandon. In 1920, Balfour was serving as territorial governor. Balfour visited Hope Valley as part of his re-election campaign. The town put on special events for his arrival, including a black-tie ball at the Queen of Hearts. During the ball, the citizens of Hope Valley tried to appeal to Balfour to have him stop the water diversion scheme. Unfortunately, he was in cahoots with Montague and refused to put a stop to it. After Lucas made a publicly broadcast speech outing Balfour as being part of the water diversion scheme, Balfour left town in disgust along with Montague. Shortly afterward, Balfour’s opponent dropped out of the race, and Lucas decided to run in his stead. Lucas was elected Governor and Balfour was out.

characters.name: Bo Sou
characters.description: Bo SouBiographyFull NameBo SouStatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesMei Sou(sister)Mike Hickam(brother-in-law)OccupationMerchant MarinerProductionSeasons11Episodes1First"Anything for Love"Last"Anything for Love"Portrayed byMike Li Bo Souis a minor character in the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byMike Li. Bo Sou is the brother and only living relative ofMei Sou. He is a merchant mariner and travels frequently.

characters.name: Bradley Ramsey
characters.description: Bradley RamseyBiographyFull NameBradley RamseyStatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesSilas Ramsey(father)†Dottie Ramsey(mother)ProductionSeasons1Episodes1First"Perils of the Soloists"Last"Perils of the Soloists"Portrayed byTanner Saunders Bradley Ramseyis a minor character who appeared inSeason 1ofWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byTanner Saunders.

characters.name: Caroline Connors
characters.description: Caroline ConnorsBiographyFull NameCaroline ConnorsStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesLydia Hastings(sister)Unnamed husbandCody Stanton(nephew)Rebecca Stanton(niece)ResidenceDavenportProductionSeasons3Episodes2First"Forever in My Heart"Last"Heartbreak"Portrayed byAnne Marie DeLuise Caroline Connorsis a minor character inSeason 3of the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byAnne Marie DeLuise. Caroline was the sister ofLydia Hastingsand the aunt ofBeckyandCody Stanton. The sisters lost touch and their parents disowned Lydia after she eloped.

characters.name: Carson Shepherd
characters.description: Carson ShepherdBiographyFull NameCarson ShepherdGenderMaleRelativesAmber Shepherd (wife, deceased)Marlise Bennett(sister-in-law)Rhonda Bennett(sister-in-law)RomancesFaith CarterSofia ConnellyOccupationDoctor at Johns Hopkins UniversityResidenceBaltimore, MDProductionSeasons4-8Episodes49First“Change of Heart”Last“The Kiss”Portrayed byPaul GreeneCarson Shepherdis a recurring character who appeared onWhen Calls the Heartin seasons 4-8. He came to town to work for the railroad. He got injured and then went to work at Abigail's Cafe. After the people of the town discovered he was a doctor, they asked him to become the town’s doctor. He became very close to Faith Carter and nearly proposed to her, but their relationship ended when he decided to pursue a career opportunity at Johns Hopkins. Unable to work with the railway company after getting injured, he worked as a cook at Abigail's Cafe. It was later revealed he is a doctor who stopped practicing after the death of his wife.

characters.name: Cat Montgomery
characters.description: Cat MontgomeryBiographyFull NameCat MontgomeryStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesJoseph Montgomery(husband, deceased)Gabe Montgomery(son)Emily Montgomery(daughter)Miles Montgomery(son)ResidenceHope ValleyProductionSeasons1Portrayed byChelah HorsdalCat Montgomeryis a recurring character in the drama seriesWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byChelah Horsdal. She is a widow and mother of three:Gabe,Miles, andEmily. Cat was one of the first mothers to show kindness toElizabethwhen she first came. She desperately wants her children to remember the good memories of their father as seen by her self-sacrificing acts in "Secrets and Lies." Possessing a great sense of teamwork and encouragement, Cat supports the women of Coal Valley while working in the mines in "Cease and Desist." She is good friends with Elizabeth andAbigail. In "These Games," she also helpsJack Thorntoncatch a thief.

characters.name: Charles Kensington III
characters.description: Charles Kensington IIICharles Kensington IIIwas introduced inWhen Calls the HeartSeason 2. Charles Kensington III isElizabeth'schildhood friend and worked for her father at the time of her visit to Hamilton in 1912.  He was interested in Elizabeth. However, she said no when he came toHope Valleyto propose to her. When Elizabeth's mother fell ill, Elizabeth returned to Hamilton to visit (escorted by Jack) and Charles hoped to rekindle their relationship.  Elizabeth enjoyed spending time with Charles but ultimately her heart belonged to Jack.  She finally told him they could only be friends.  At Elizabeth's sister Viola's stirring, Charles (who never understood Elizabeth's desire to be a teacher)went to Hope Valley and proposed to her.  He may have later married, as Elizabeth's wedding guest list in 1920 listed Mr. and Mrs. Charles Kensington.

characters.name: Charlotte
characters.description: CharlotteBiographyStatusAliveGenderFemaleResidenceBrookfieldProductionSeasonsWHC Season 2First"A New Beginning"Portrayed byJasper Green Charlotteis a recurring character in the drama seriesWhen Hope Calls. She is portrayed byJasper Green. Charlotte lived atNew Hope Orphanageunder the care ofLillian Walsh. She became blind after her parents died. Her blindness led to an increased hearing acuity.

characters.name: Charlotte Thornton
characters.description: Charlotte ThorntonBiographyStatusAliveGenderFemaleRelativesThomas Thornton(husband) †Jack Thornton(son) †Tom Thornton(son)Elizabeth Thornton(daughter-in-law)Jack Thornton Jr.(grandson)OccupationBoarding House OwnerResidenceCape FullertonProductionSeasons3,13Episodes2First"Hearts in Question"Last"Prayers from the Heart"Portrayed byBrooke ShieldsCharlotte Thorntonis a minor character who appeared inSeason 3andSeason 13ofWhen Calls the Heart. She is portrayed byBrooke Shields. Charlotte Thornton was the widow ofThomas Thornton, mother ofJackandTom Thorntonand grandmother ofJack Thornton Jr.Charlotte grew up poor and therefore understood the importance of a good education. She was a schoolteacher in her younger days, which was her way of giving back to the community. The first class she taught met in a tent. Charlotte was not a talented cook, but she was a skilled seamstress and made all her own clothes. She was an early riser, using the time to get chores done. She never married again after her husband died, and raised their two boys alone. Charlotte consideredRosemarythe daughter she never had, although she knew that Rosemary and Jack hadn’t been a good match.

characters.name: Christopher Hughes
characters.description: Christopher HughesBiographyFull NameChristopher HughesStatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesHenry Gowen(father)Unnamed motherJerry (stepfather)RomancesRachel Thom(fiancée)OccupationAssistant Regional Advisor atPioneer ElectricProductionSeasons8,13First“No Regrets”Portrayed byJames Drew DeanChristopher Hugheswas introduced inSeason 8ofWhen Calls the Heart. He is portrayed byJames Drew Dean. Christopher was the son of Henry Gowen, but after his parents' divorce, grew up inHamiltonwith his mother and stepfather, Jerry, who was a banker. Christopher grew up referring to his father as "Henry," and his stepfather as "Dad." After Henry asked Lucas to come back to work at the oil company, Lucas reached out to Christopher, asking him to come to Hope Valley to keep an eye on Henry. Christopher borrowed a car that had been stolen by a friend, and left it outside of Hope Valley, where it was later recovered and investigated by Nathan and Bill. Christopher and his father had a bit of a rough re-introduction, but it was clear that Henry wanted to patch things up between them. After Henry's health scare, it became evident that Christopher did still love his father, even if they didn't always get along.
